Notice Of Motion To Compel Reponses To Form Interogatories-Employment Law, Responses To Request For Production Of Documents And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-09-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ashwin Ladva of Ladva Law Firm telephone number 415-296-8844 for Plaintiff.
Michael Melchin of The Law Office of Michael Melchin telephone number 650-588-8019 for Defendant.

The Parties stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The matter was argued. PLAINTIFF GABRIEL PADILLA'S Motion To Compel Reponses To Form Interrogatories-Employment Law, Responses To Request For Production Of Documents And For Sanctions is granted as to sanctions only. Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Dennis Hyde. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)
